## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — tooling/infra

## Verification

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (new tests added where relevant)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] An ADR was added/updated for significant technical decisions

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, risks. -->
